title: Lesson 185: (Grammar) - space (between); gap; interval; distance; stretch;...

intro_cards.title: Duration: 間
intro_cards.body:
間 (あいだ) means 'while' / 'during' — covering the entire overlapping period.

Pattern: [noun]の間 / [verb ている]間

• 授業の間は静かにしてください。
(Please be quiet during the class.)
• 日本にいる間、毎日勉強した。
(While I was in Japan, I studied every day.)

間 vs とき:
• 間 = throughout the entire period (continuous overlap)
• とき = at the time of / when (point or general time)

間に (with に) = something happens at some point WITHIN that period:
• 待っている間に本を読んだ。(I read a book while waiting.)
